zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Epes於1482年出生在英國肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼時，她的父親Sir John Eppes I2歲，母親Bendecta57歲。她於1496年與John Garrard在英國英格蘭肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1572年在英國肯特肯特享年90歲。

nameMeanings.name: Epes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Epps
meanings: English: from Middle English (h)apse, (h)aspe ‘aspen tree, white poplar’ (Old English æpse, æspe). Generally, this was a topographic name for someone who lived by an aspen tree or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Apps in Surrey, Apse Manor on the Isle of Wight, or The Asps in Warwickshire.

English: perhaps from the Middle English personal name Eppe, a possible survival of Old English Eoppa, or its female counterpart Eoppe (Latinized in post-Conquest records as Eppa), probably from a stem eorp- ‘red’. Alternatively, Eppe may derive from Old Norse Øpi, perhaps from the stem øp- found in the verb øpa ‘to cry out, shriek’.
American shortened form of   Van Epps  , a surname of Dutch origin.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Epes was born in 1482, in Old Romney, Kent, England, her father, Sir John Eppes I, was 2 and her mother, Bendecta, was 57. She married John Garrard in 1496, in Old Romney, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1572, in Kent, Kent, England, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Epes est née en 1482, à Old Romney, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Eppes I, avait 2 ans et sa mère, Bendecta, avait 57 ans. Elle a épousé John Garrard en 1496, à Old Romney, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1572, à Kent, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Epesが1482年にイギリスケントオルド ロムニーで生まれた時，父Sir John Eppes Iは2歳，母Bendectaは57歳であった。1496年にイギリスイギリスケントオルド ロムニーでJohn Garrardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1572年にイギリスケントケントで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Epes(이)가 1482년 영국 켄트 드 롬니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Eppes I(은)는 2세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bendecta(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 1496년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 드 롬니에서 John Garrard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 영국 켄트 켄트에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Epes родилась в 1482 г. в местности олд ромни, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Eppes I было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Bendecta, 57. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Garrard в 1496 г. в местности олд ромни, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1572 г. в местности кэнт, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 90 лет.
